name: David Kim
bio: Met David at university during our CS degree. Now we work in the same industry. We catch up over coffee whenever he's in town.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: Emma is my cousin who moved to London three years ago. We try to video call every month but life gets busy. Miss her a lot.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Lisa was my manager at my first job. She taught me so much about the industry. We still keep in touch and she's a great mentor.

name: James Wright
bio: James and I met on a hiking trip in Nepal. We bonded over our love for adventure travel and have been planning our next trip since.

name: Sofia Reyes
bio: Sofia has been my best friend since freshman year. We talk almost every week and she's always the first person I call with big news.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: Marcus and I worked together at a startup for two years. We went through a lot together — late nights, product launches, and team chaos.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: Aisha and I were roommates in college. We share a passion for photography and still go on photo walks together when schedules allow.

name: Oliver Bennett
bio: Oliver is my childhood neighbor who's now living in Canada. We grew up playing football together. I really need to call him soon.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya is a designer I collaborate with on freelance projects. She has an incredible eye for detail and always pushes the work to be better.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: Carlos and I bonded over music production in college. He's now a professional sound engineer in Madrid. Time zones make it hard to connect.

name: Nadia Hassan
bio: Nadia and I met at a travel blogging conference. We've since visited three countries together and are planning a trip to Japan next year.

name: Ethan Clarke
bio: Ethan is my younger brother's best friend who became like a brother to me too. We play online games together weekly and grab lunch when possible.
